item.title: Prostate RT Linked to High Rate of Late Urinary Toxicities
item.description: A recent prospective study highlights the substantial burden of late RT-related genitourinary complications among men with prostate cancer. Medscape M...

item.title: Depression Linked to Cognitive Burden in Epilepsy
item.description: More severe depressive symptoms are associated with greater cognitive burden in epilepsy, even after considering seizure and epileptiform abnormality ...

item.title: Neonatal Seizures Tied to Mortality and Disability by Age 5
item.description: Neonatal seizures in infants born at or beyond 36 weeks of gestation are linked to notably higher in-hospital mortality; nearly 1 in 4 survivors devel...

item.title: How Do Consultation Frequencies Vary for Older Adults?
item.description: General practices in Denmark show variation in consultation frequencies for older adults, which has increased from the period of 2017-2020 to 2021. Me...
